title.subtitle: Percentage of children accessing the internet via mobile devices

transform.calculate: datum.properties.STATE_NAME == 'New South Wales' || datum.properties.STATE_NAME == 'Australian Capital Territory' ? 'NSW/ACT' : datum.properties.STATE_NAME == 'Victoria' || datum.properties.STATE_NAME == 'Tasmania' ? 'Vic/Tas' : datum.properties.STATE_NAME == 'Queensland' ? 'Qld' : datum.properties.STATE_NAME == 'South Australia' || datum.properties.STATE_NAME == 'Northern Territory' ? 'SA/NT' : datum.properties.STATE_NAME == 'Western Australia' ? 'WA' : 'Other'
